title: neckeria aurea
intro: Neckeria aurea, also known as gold back fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Menyanthaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Neckeria aurea are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Neckeria aurea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
